title: Scout recovery 2: structure executable plan
description:
Previous scout output could not pass plan validation.
Transform existing intelligence into a VALID structured execution plan.

Goal:

Build a complete Personal Finance Tracker web application from scratch in C:\project\pi\personal-finance-tracker.

## Project Requirements
Build a full-featured personal finance tracker with:

### Core Features
1. **Dashboard** - Summary cards (total balance, income, expenses, savings rate), monthly overview chart
2. **Transactions** - Add/edit/delete income & expense transactions, categories, date, description, amount
3. **Budget Limits** - Set monthly spending limits per category, visual progress bars showing usage vs limit
4. **Reports** - Monthly breakdown charts, category pie chart, income vs expense trend
5. **Categories** - Default categories: Food, Transport, Housing, Entertainment, Health, Shopping, Education, Salary, Freelance, Investment

### Tech Stack
- **Vite + React + TypeScript** (no backend, localStorage for persistence)
- **Tailwind CSS** for styling
- **Recharts** for charts
- **date-fns** for date handling
- **lucide-react** for icons

### Architecture
- `src/types/` - TypeScript interfaces (Transaction, Budget, Category)
- `src/store/` - useFinanceStore hook with localStorage persistence
- `src/components/` - Reusable UI components (Card, Modal, Button, Input, ProgressBar)
- `src/pages/` - Dashboard, Transactions, Budget, Reports pages
- `src/utils/` - formatCurrency, formatDate, calculateStats helpers
- `src/App.tsx` - Main app with sidebar navigation

### Design
- Clean, modern design with sidebar navigation
- Color-coded categories
- Responsive layout
- Empty states with helpful messages
- Form validation with error messages

### Scout Tasks
1. Check if there's an existing package.json or any files in the project directory
2. Read C:\Users\endab\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\@mariozechner\pi-coding-agent\README.md for context

### Worker Tasks (Parallel)
Worker 1 - Project Setup:
- Create package.json with all dependencies
- Create vite.config.ts
- Create tsconfig.json
- Create index.html
- Create tailwind.config.js
- Create postcss.config.js

Worker 2 - Types & Store:
- Create src/types/index.ts with all TypeScript interfaces
- Create src/store/useFinanceStore.ts with full CRUD + localStorage

Worker 3 - Utility & Base Components:
- Create src/utils/index.ts (formatCurrency, formatDate, calculateStats, getCategoryColor)
- Create src/components/Card.tsx
- Create src/components/Button.tsx
- Create src/components/Input.tsx
- Create src/components/Modal.tsx
- Create src/components/ProgressBar.tsx
- Create src/components/Sidebar.tsx

Worker 4 - Pages:
- Create src/pages/Dashboard.tsx
- Create src/pages/Transactions.tsx
- Create src/pages/Budget.tsx
- Create src/pages/Reports.tsx

Worker 5 - App Entry:
- Create src/App.tsx with routing between pages
- Create src/main.tsx
- Create src/index.css with Tailwind directives

### Soldier Review
- Ensure all TypeScript types are consistent
- Verify imports are correct across all files
- Check that localStorage persistence works
- Ensure charts have proper data handling
- Verify budget limits feature is complete

Make the app production-quality, fully functional, and visually polished.
